name: orchestration
description: Generic orchestration framework. The main session acts as orchestrator and dispatches work to architect, engineer, and reviewer specialists. A Phase 0 analyst agent deterministically detects the workspace topology (single-repo, monorepo, or a parent folder of independent repos), profiles each member, and records a personal, gitignored workspace profile so runs are deterministic and your config never gets committed. Each run keeps an on-disk manifest (baselines + per-task status) so interrupted runs resume instead of restarting, and gates are independently re-run by the orchestrator rather than trusted from the engineer's self-report. Specialists are project-agnostic and learn each member's stack and conventions from its CLAUDE.md at runtime.
